records.ety: [L. humiliatus, p. p. of humiliare. See Humble.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Humiliated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Humiliating.]

defs: To reduce to a lower position in one's own eyes, or in the eyes of others; to cause a loss of pride or dignity; to humble; to mortify.
quotes: We stand humiliated rather than encouraged.
